title: Combat-Hud Indicator
description: A lightweight multifunctional client-side mod that displays many HUDs necessary for both PVP and Survival gameplay.
body:
**Combat-Hud Indicator** offers real-time tracking for cooldowns, health alerts, utility timers, and more, all in a sleek, customizable interface designed specifically for Minecraft 1.21.11.

# How to Use:
Simply place the latest mod file, "**combat-hud-indicator-1.21.11-1.2.0.jar**", into your  **.minecraft\mods** folder.

# Key Features:
- **Combat Trackers:** Monitor your shield, ender pearl, and wind charge cooldowns with clear and precise icons.
- **Vital Warnings:** Visual alerts when player take damage and many sprite warnings for low item and armor durabilities.
- **Tactical Timers:** Stay ahead with built-in TNT primed timers and Totem counters.
- **Resource Tracking:** Keep an eye on your arrows, and XYZ coordinates.
- **Survival Needs:** Track health and hunger efficiently.
- **Chat Privacy:** Optional chat blocker to avoid distractions or toxicity while playing.

# Fully Customizable:
Access the configuration menu via the ESC menu to toggle any feature, specifically the button "**Hud**", including:
- Heart & Low Health Icons
- Hunger & Armor Display
- Shield & Hurt Detection
- Arrow Count & Totem Counter
- Ender Pearl & Wind Charge Cooldowns
- TNT Timer & XYZ Coordinates
- Chat Block
- Experimental features (NEW!)
- Hud Scaling (NEW!)

Need a smaller HUD? Cycle through three scales: **1 (default)**, **2 (small)**, and **3 (smaller)** to fit your preference.

# Technical Info
- **Platform:** Fabric (latest version)
- **Fabric API needed:** "fabric-api-0.141.3+1.21.11"
- **Minecraft Version:** 1.21.11 (older or newer versions are untested but should work.)

# Note:
If configuration changes don’t apply on newer updates, delete the old **combat-hud-indicator** folder located at **.minecraft/config** for a fresh start.

## (HUD elements are spaced out for a clear overview, avoiding clutter or screen overcrowding)
